memoryArtifacts.headline: Henri VI of Luxembourg
memoryArtifacts.description: Henri VI of Luxembourg , born in 1250 , killed in Worringen onJune 5, 1288, was Count of Luxembourg and Arlon from 1281 to 1288 . He was the son of Henri V , Count of Luxembourg, and Marguerite de Bar …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Henri de Luxembourg VI Le Lion於1240年出生在比利時盧布格時，他的父親Henri de Luxembourg V24歲，母親Marguerite de Bar20歲。他於1261年與Beatrice d'Avesnes結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1288年6月5日在德國海因里希_海普洛文次可爾享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henri de Luxembourg VI Le Lion于1240年出生在比利时盧布格时，他的父亲Henri de Luxembourg V24岁，母亲Marguerite de Bar20岁。他于1261年与Beatrice d'Avesnes结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1288年6月5日在德国海因里希_海普洛文次可爾享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Henri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henri de Luxembourg VI Le Lion was born in 1240, in Luxembourg, Belgium, his father, Henri de Luxembourg V, was 24 and his mother, Marguerite de Bar, was 20. He married Beatrice d'Avesnes in 1261. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 5 June 1288, in Köln, Rhineland, Prussia, Germany, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henri de Luxembourg VI Le Lion est né en 1240, à Luxembourg, Belgique, son père, Henri de Luxembourg V, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Bar, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Beatrice d'Avesnes en 1261. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 5 juin 1288, à Köln, Rhénanie, Prusse, Allemagne, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henri de Luxembourg VI Le Lion 1240 in Luxemburg, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henri de Luxembourg V 24 und seine Mutter Marguerite de Bar 20. Er hat 1261 Beatrice d'Avesnes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 5. Juni 1288 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Köln, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henri de Luxembourg VI Le Lion è nato il nel 1240 nel Lussemburgo, Belgio, il suo padre, Henri de Luxembourg V, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Marguerite de Bar, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Beatrice d'Avesnes nel 1261. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 5 giugno 1288, nel Köln, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Germania, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henri de Luxembourg VI Le Lionが1240年にベルギールクセンボウルグで生まれた時，父Henri de Luxembourg Vは24歳，母Marguerite de Barは20歳であった。1261年にBeatrice d'Avesnesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1288年6月5日にドイツプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズクoルンで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henri de Luxembourg VI Le Lion(이)가 1240년 벨기에 루세보우르그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henri de Luxembourg V(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite de Bar(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1261년 Beatrice d'Avesnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1288년 6월 5일 독일 플레우ss 리인플로빈츠 ko에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henri de Luxembourg VI Le Lion nasceu em 1240, em Luxemburgo, Bélgica, seu pai, Henri de Luxembourg V, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Bar, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrice d'Avesnes em 1261. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de junho de 1288, em Köln, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Alemanha, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henri de Luxembourg VI Le Lion родился в 1240 г. в местности луксембург, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Henri de Luxembourg V было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Bar, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrice d'Avesnes в 1261 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 5 июня 1288 г. в местности кoлн, раинпровинз, Пруссия, Германия в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henri de Luxembourg VI Le Lion nació en 1240, en Luxemburgo, Bélgica, su papá, Henri de Luxembourg V, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Bar, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Beatrice d'Avesnes en 1261. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 5 de junio de 1288, en Köln, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Alemania, a la edad de 48 años.
